specs.title: cp-000: Uses JSZip library dynamically imported
cp-001: Filename projectTitlezip sanitized
cp-002: Preserves file paths from project structure
cp-003: Debounced saves 1500ms after last keystroke
cp-004: Per-file tracking saves the currently active file
cp-005: File tree stays in sync with editor content
cp-006: Save state managed in Zustand store
cp-007: CmdS saves immediately from store-backed content without explicitly clearing any
cp-008: Calls updateLatexFile server action
cp-009: Current file is auto-saved before compilation starts
cp-010: EditorPreview toggle bottom bar switches between Editor and Preview views
cp-011: File tree opens as full-screen overlay fixed inset-0
cp-012: Close button in header
cp-013: Auto-closes after file selection or jump-to-line
cp-014: Agent panel opens as full-screen overlay
cp-015: Close button in header
cp-016: Header shows AI Assistant label
cp-017: Floating buttons folder icon left and chat icon right to open panels
cp-018: Touch targets minimum 44px touch target size on all buttons
cp-019: Preview close X button to go back to editor
cp-020: Agent panel narrower width 256px instead of 288px
cp-021: Agent panel toggle hidden on tablet use floating button instead
cp-022: File tree normal sidebar behavior
cp-023: Side-by-side layout editor and preview visible simultaneously
cp-024: File tree toggle tab left-edge button
cp-025: Agent panel toggle tab right-edge button
cp-026: Full panel widths file tree 224px agent panel 288px
cp-027: Retry logic 3 attempts with exponential backoff
cp-028: Not found This LaTeX workspace is not ready yet error card
cp-029: Network error Unable to load this LaTeX workspace error card
cp-030: Retry button re-triggers loading
cp-031: Back button returns to latex project list
cp-032: Rate limiting 429 auto-retry with Retry-After header
cp-033: Service unavailable 502503504 friendly message retry
cp-034: Network failure retry up to 2 times
